collection_note: Public retailer evidence captured without bypassing authentication or access controls. Availability and price are location- and time-dependent. Costco listings are 32 oz club-pack flavor variants and are not blended into exact 16 oz written-review trends.

written_reviews.title: Love it
written_reviews.text: Love this brand. Tasty. Convenient.

written_reviews.title: Delicious, quick, and easy!
written_reviews.text: Very delicious, easy, and quick! We made this and put it over rice for dinner. I was worried about the beef being a weird texture or tasting weird, but it was so tender and the flavor was very good! We will definitely be buying this again!

written_reviews.title: Highly Recommend
written_reviews.text: Tasty. Made rice to add. Very filling. I recommend any of Kevin's fully-cooked entree.

written_reviews.title: quality and tastes good!
written_reviews.text: We liked this very much! I appreciate that it is grass fed beef without antibiotics and soy free. Certified Paleo. 1 g of added sugar! I thought this was impossible in convenience foods! Thank you Kevin's for putting out a quality food! I WILL BE purchasing this again!

written_reviews.title: Busy moms get on this!
written_reviews.text: Perfect quick meal for busy moms. This is grassfed beef that is more on the nutritious side. I make a side of brown rice to go with. Fast, easy, healthy and delish!

written_reviews.title: Yummy healthy meat option, for a quick meal!
written_reviews.text: Great quality & flavor!

written_reviews.title: Really Good
written_reviews.text: never disappoints. overall easy to prepare, easy to move everything to the dishwasher afterward. these are also sold at whole foods. you're going to need more than one of these for a small family. especially if you have boys. Only complaint is Kroger's deceptive pricing, placing the Thai Version ONLY on a $2 off 3+ Sale. but without deceptive pricing, would it still be Kroger?

written_reviews.title: Senior on a fixed income, this is too pricey.
written_reviews.text: I had an offer for 50% off so I thought I would give it a try. I found it to be tasty and somewhat tender but lacking vegetables. I put it on top of white rice. I ate about half the package; there is three servings in a package. I would only buy it again if I could get it for half off because I would not pay close to $12. Would like to try their chicken one if I get another 50% off offer.

written_reviews.title: Tasty but deceptive serving size
written_reviews.text: The taste and texture are very enjoyable. I got it on clearance half price but don't know if full price is worth it. I was disappointed by the amount as it says there are three 5 oz servings but I couldn't even get two 4 oz servings out of it. I don't know if they're including the broth weight which would be dumb since the instructions say drain the broth before cooking, or the raw meat weight which is also dumb since it's sold fully cooked. Just glad I didn't plan on feeding 3 people with it.

written_reviews.title: Easy make quick dinner!
written_reviews.text: My son and I both loved the flavor and it was super easy to make. I added some garlic mashed potatoes and it was a perfect dinner.

written_reviews.title: Approved
written_reviews.text: The meat looks a bit scary when you open it and you'll need to manually break it apart yourself but I followed all the directions and it tastes like legit beef and I think the sauce was delicious. The meat doesn't taste grainy either. It's a bit pricey but very convenient and easy to make.

written_reviews.title: Not very impressed
written_reviews.text: This stuff is just ok. The flavors are pretty mediocre, I see red pepper flakes but there's ZERO heat, even in the curry one. It tastes like some low quality buffet food to be honest. For the price, I could get a larger portion from a local restaurant with significantly better taste. But it's convenient and not terrible so, 3 stars I guess.

written_reviews.title: Eat Out for Lunch Instead for $14
written_reviews.text: Too pricey at $14 and meat is chewy. Sauce is ok. I'd rather eat lunch out instead for this amount. No clean dishes to clean also.

written_reviews.title: Good but poor serving size
written_reviews.text: It's delicious but the serving size is definitely deceptive. We weighed it before we cooked it after we opened it and there was 8 oz of meat. Enough for two people but we had our son as well.

written_reviews.title: Kevin should be ashamed of himself
written_reviews.text: For $13 I expect more than just the sauce to be edible. The meat is a sad grey-ish brown clump of mystery protein with virtually no beef flavor and a very unpleasant mealy texture. If you're looking for a quick dinner, buy some actual pre-marinated beef.

written_reviews.title: Good sauce - not so good beef
written_reviews.text: Sauce was good, but the meat was a little tough and chewy.

written_reviews.title: Not a fan
written_reviews.text: The texture and flavor very questionable.

written_reviews.title: Not good - do not buy
written_reviews.text: Packaging looks like it would be good but it just was not. It had a smell when I opened it and started to cook. The appearance, texture and consistency was what I think dog food would be like. I tried to eat it and tossed it.

written_reviews.title: You're not getting 16 ounces
written_reviews.text: I followed the cooking instructions exactly as stated. The Korean barbecue lists 16 ounces on the front of the package. After preparing this meal the total weight was 11.4 ounces. For a family of three that's less than 4 ounces per serving. The chicken did taste good, but not worth the money.

written_reviews.title: DO NOT WASTE YOUR MONEY
written_reviews.text: barely a serving of meat, the packaging is VERY misleading. minimal flavor, not even worth the effort to cook it. don't buy

written_reviews.title: Maybe not
written_reviews.text: I love bulgogi beef but this was not it. It tasted like beef jerky drenched in hoisin sauce.

written_reviews.title: ZERO STARS! GRAINY MEAT. TASTELESS SAUCE!
written_reviews.text: DON'T BUY!! GRAINY AND CHALKY MEAT. TASTELESS SAUCE. SO DISAPPOINTED!!

written_reviews.title: Bulgogi? Not hardly.
written_reviews.text: This is a very poor excuse for bulgogi. Best to make it yourself. Beef was chunked and not thinly sliced. Small portion of beef for the money. No spice flavor detected. It was sweet though.

written_reviews.title: Terrible
written_reviews.text: This was not good at all. I threw it away. The meat was not edible.

written_reviews.title: not great...not even close to as advertised
written_reviews.text: not even close to bulgogi taste. the beef was thick and dry even though it was marinated with liquid mix
